title: First Team Update Anxiety
presenting_complaint: The trainee is working with a case involving anxiety before giving short verbal updates in team meetings. The person fears freezing, sounding unintelligent, and being judged by coworkers.
trigger_events: Manager asks for a spontaneous update
Meeting turns to the trainee's workstream
A colleague speaks confidently just before the trainee
sample_thoughts: I am going to mess this up.
They will realize I do not know what I am doing.
If I hesitate, everyone will notice.
hidden_beliefs: If I make a mistake, people will think I am incompetent.
Anxiety means I am not capable.

title: Avoiding Social Invitations
presenting_complaint: The case involves repeated avoidance of invitations because the person expects awkwardness, embarrassment, and rejection.
trigger_events: Someone asks if they are joining
A social plan is mentioned at work
sample_thoughts: I will make things awkward.
They will notice I do not fit in.
If I go, I will regret it.
hidden_beliefs: If I am awkward, people will reject me.
I must appear comfortable to be accepted.

title: Study Procrastination Before Exams
presenting_complaint: The case involves delaying study sessions because opening the material quickly triggers dread and self-criticism.
trigger_events: Receives a reminder about the exam date
sample_thoughts: I am already behind.
If I cannot do this perfectly, starting is pointless.
I will fail anyway.
sample_behaviors: scrolls on the phone instead of starting
hidden_beliefs: If I cannot do it perfectly, starting is pointless.
Struggle means I am not smart enough.

title: Low Mood After Losing Routine
presenting_complaint: The case involves low mood and increasing withdrawal after a major routine disruption removed daily structure.
trigger_events: Sees tasks building up at home
sample_thoughts: The whole day is already ruined.
I cannot get myself together.
There is no point in trying now.
hidden_beliefs: If I am not productive, I am failing.
Without structure, I will fall apart.

title: Conflict After Unanswered Messages
presenting_complaint: The case involves intense emotional reactions when close contacts do not respond quickly to messages.
trigger_events: A reply is much shorter than expected
sample_thoughts: They are upset with me.
I am being ignored on purpose.
I must have done something wrong.
hidden_beliefs: If someone pulls away, it means I am not important.
I am easy to abandon.

title: Workplace Perfectionism Cycle
presenting_complaint: The case involves over-preparing, slow task completion, and high distress around minor work errors.
trigger_events: Needs to submit work for review
Finds a typo or small mistake
sample_thoughts: This must be flawless.
A small error will expose me.
If I submit this now, people will see I am not good enough.
hidden_beliefs: Mistakes prove I am inadequate.
I must perform flawlessly to be respected.

title: Panic-Driven Avoidance of Public Transport
presenting_complaint: The case involves avoiding buses and trains after repeated panic episodes during travel.
sample_thoughts: I am going to panic and lose control.
I will embarrass myself in front of everyone.
I need to get out immediately.
hidden_beliefs: If panic starts, I will lose control in public.
I cannot cope without escape.

title: Relationship Reassurance Seeking
presenting_complaint: The case involves repeated requests for reassurance in a relationship, followed by short-lived relief and renewed doubt.
sample_thoughts: They are pulling away.
If I do not check, I will be blindsided.
I need proof that things are okay.
hidden_beliefs: Unless I am constantly reassured, I will be left.
Uncertainty means danger in relationships.

title: Shame-Linked Core Belief Pattern
presenting_complaint: The case involves repeated withdrawal after perceived criticism, with long-standing shame and self-downing themes across contexts.
trigger_events: Makes a visible mistake in front of others
sample_thoughts: This proves I am defective.
People can finally see what is wrong with me.
I should disappear before they reject me.
hidden_beliefs: I am fundamentally defective.
Criticism reveals what is already wrong with me.

title: Chronic Avoidance With Multi-Step Treatment Planning
presenting_complaint: The case involves broad life restriction across work, social activity, and health routines due to fear of failure and overwhelm.
trigger_events: Needs to begin a demanding task
sample_thoughts: If I cannot guarantee success, I should not try.
I will fail and prove I am incapable.
Starting will make everything worse.
hidden_beliefs: If I cannot guarantee success, I should not try.
Taking action will expose my inadequacy.
